title: InstaQuit
description: Allows you to instantly quit the world with a single keypress
body:
# InstaQuit  
**Instant Disconnect Mod for Minecraft**  

Press the **I** key (configurable) to instantly exit worlds/servers without confirmation screens or delays.  

### Features  
- **Instant Exit**: Quit with a single keypress.  
- **Custom Keybind**: Rebind the panic button in-game.  
- **Lightweight**: Zero performance overhead.  
- **Universal Compatibility**: Works in Singleplayer, Multiplayer, and Realms.
